hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Helnan Portfouad in Portfouad offers a spacious chalet with one bedroom and one bathroom. Guests enjoy a balcony with garden views, a fully equipped kitchen, and a private pool.
Modern Amenities: The chalet features air-conditioning, a TV, and a private pool. Amenities include a fully equipped kitchen, balcony, and a comfortable bedroom.
Convenient Location: Located on Chantier Island, the property provides easy access to local attractions. Reception staff speak Arabic and English, ensuring a pleasant stay.
